what: Clone vault repository to local storage
why: Get vault content for knowledge indexing
output: Clone result with local path, commit hash, and file count

success_handling.criteria: git clone completes successfully and local directory contains repository files

event.message: Repository cloned successfully to local storage

error_handling.criteria: git clone fails with 'No space left on device' or ENOSPC error
error_handling.action: Abort registration, report disk space issue to user

event.message: Insufficient disk space to clone repository: {error}

error_handling.criteria: git clone times out or connection is reset during transfer
error_handling.action: Abort registration, suggest user check network and retry

decisions.outcome: Use shallow clone (--depth 1) to save bandwidth and reduce clone time
Clean up partial clone directory, abort registration
